findings.description: The page opens with a continuation paragraph about SLA benefits and a sample SLA contract clause ('乙が監視するネットワークにおいて、回線異常を検知した場合には、検知した異常の内容を60分以内に甲に報告するものとする') used as an illustrative example. This prose and sample clause are not represented by any entity. Low severity as they are illustrative text rather than exam terms.

reviewer_notes: R1.1 fix confirmed: both figure entities (p293::5 and p293::6) have jp captions starting with '試験にはコレが出る！' as required. Section heading SLM/SLA, and all four term entities (SLA, SLM, 可用性管理, 可用性) are accurate vs the image. Both exam callout boxes are represented with appropriate subtitles ('SLM・SLAのポイント' and '可用性管理のポイント'). Only gap is illustrative prose not extracted, which is low severity.
